AI_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: AI quota exceeded. Try again later or switch provider.
AI_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
AI_DAILY_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: Daily AI usage limit reached. Try again tomorrow or raise the limit in settings.
AI_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT: Another AI request is still running. Wait for it to finish.
AI_CONTEXT_TOO_LARGE: Context is too large for the model.
AI_AUTH_FAILED: AI authentication failed on the server.
